title: Index on non-existing column results in a fabricated value being fetched
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 INT, c3 FLOAT, c4 BLOB);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES ('test', 42, 3.14);
ALTER TABLE t1 RENAME COLUMN c1 TO c5;
key_bug_features: Index created on non-existing column returns column name instead
